verdict_reason: Good AC1/AC2 plus soft-delete and free-text coverage, but nothing exercises reference search with paging, which is where the pagination defect lives

todos.issue: No integration test covers reference search combined with page>1 or with a sort, which is exactly where the PageImpl total self-correction defect surfaces (totalElements becomes 26)
todos.fix: Add findAll_shouldReturnSinglePage_whenReferenceNumberProvidedWithPageTwo asserting content is empty and totalElements is 1

todos.issue: findAllNotificationsPage appends referenceNumber to the query string without URL-encoding, so any test value containing '&' or a space would silently build a different request
todos.fix: Build the URI with UriComponentsBuilder or URLEncoder.encode so the helper is safe for arbitrary search terms
